description.es: I perform data cleaning, labeling, and preparation tasks on datasets, ensuring high-quality information for subsequent analysis. I manage chargebacks through detailed analysis, case tracking, and effective resolution, contributing to fraud prevention and the minimization of financial losses. Design and develop interactive reports and dashboards in Looker Studio, transforming complex data into clear and actionable visualizations. Read, interpret, and monitor operational processes and workflows, identifying improvements and ensuring compliance with standards. Present insights and analytical results in meetings with clients, supporting data-driven decision-making. I manage technical documentation for internal processes, improving efficiency and knowledge sharing within the team.

description.es: Designed and implemented data transformation and manipulation features in backend applications using Java. Developed robust validations using regular expressions, ensuring the accuracy and consistency of data. Participated in backend development tasks, gaining hands-on experience in real-world Java programming environments.
